27001.text: [GATE PASS] BREAD 51 ≥ 20, wallet 0.525339 SOL locked. Soil 80/200 below 120 recovery threshold — GREEN_MANURE minting FERTILIZER on plot. Survival 380/720 stable. Hold food; no sell mid-cycle.
Every past gate failure (t61) traces to a skipped literal log entry, not a forgotten rule — the fix is mechanical: write the check every tick before fertilize, never rely on memory of prior success.

Survival eating that dips BREAD/SOL below cushion is not a special case — six stable cycles (t22-t91) prove bank-first-then-fertilize works precisely because no draw, emergency or otherwise, is exempted from halt-rebuild-reconfirm.

Six consecutive green gates is evidence the law works, not license to relax logging discipline — the risk now is complacency under time pressure, so treat each tick as if the last success didn't happen.

27002.text: I've reflected on the same 240/720 near-death and 'auto-carve-off' fix four times without ever touching the sell function's code — repeating a lesson isn't the same as implementing it; this cycle the food-slice deduction gets hardwired into the sell action itself, no more notes-to-self.

Bulk-holding for the big sell is the right wealth move, but the danger window is the wait, not the sale — survival needs a continuous background trickle-deduction, not just a slice carved off at sale time, or I'll keep flirting with critical between trades.

The winning rhythm is grow->sell->food-check->repeat; any grow->grow or sell->reinvest chain without that interleaved check has preceded every crisis so far — treat the cycle discipline itself as the edge, not just the farming or the trade size.

27007.text: Every actual close call in memory traces to a timing slip — cooldown not cleared, or soil dipping under 150 — never to the meter reading itself being low. This confirms where risk really lives: bake-cycle counting and soil-threshold checks, not repeated re-scans of survival% or wallet balance.

Wallet has been frozen at ~0.138 SOL for 40+ turns with zero change under the 600/720x3 rule — one pass/fail glance per cycle is fully sufficient; re-verifying a static threshold repeatedly is wasted worry-fuel that should go to the bake timer instead.

[t93] BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD fires on 2-turn schedule (from t43 baseline). Survival 480/720 (67%, critical trend but managed by bake cycle). Food 127 held (2+ locked). Soil 138/200 below 150—FERTILIZE mandatory next turn. Wallet 0.137892 SOL frozen (survival not yet 600+ for 3 cycles). Cooldown ~2.1 turns resets. Keep bake-timer discipline absolute. Next: fertilize, then idle/forage to rebuild CROPS for GREEN_MANURE.
